ideation: This animation sequence simulates the motion of roller skating.  The arms naturally move to maintain balance and propel the body forward. We'll focus on a smooth, rhythmic motion, alternating between extending the arms for balance and bringing them in slightly for propulsion. The robot's lack of elbows will be accounted for in the arm movements.  We'll use slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions to add a sense of natural movement, avoiding a rigid, mechanical look.  The left arm will lead in some frames, and the right in others, to mimic the shifting balance of skating.

frames.beat: arms swing gently outwards, ready to glide
arms cross slightly, pushing off for momentum
arms extend outwards for balance, a smooth glide
arms swing inwards, preparing for the next push
